message:
Add MessageContent component for transcript viewer

- Parse content into text and code blocks
- Detect language from fence or content heuristics
- Syntax highlighting with react-syntax-highlighter and oneDark theme
- Line numbers for blocks with 5+ lines
- Language badge for code blocks

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-8n2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
